description:
The libcap-ng-utils package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install libcap-ng-utils
rationale:
<tt>libcap-ng-utils</tt> contains applications to analyze the posix
posix capabilities of all the programs running on a system.
<tt>libcap-ng-utils</tt> also lets system operators set the file
system based capabilities.
ocil_clause: the libcap-ng-utils package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the libcap-ng-utils package is installed: 
$ rpm -q libcap-ng-utils
title: Install libcap-ng-utils Package
